title: Pizzamon (Stuffed Crust Pizza Pack)
description: Custom freeform modpack for singleplayer / small co-operative focused servers with Cobblemon and Create as its keystones
body:
# THIS PACK REQUIRES AN ABSOLUTE MINIMUM OF 6GB OF RAM, BUT 8GB IS RECOMMENDED. MAKE SURE TO CHANGE THIS IN YOUR MODPACK LAUNCHING PLATFORM!

[For full mod list, changelogs, an issue tracker, mini-wiki (coming soon), and more, check out the Github!](https://github.com/NFinET/pizzamon_1.21.1_mc_modpack)

Freeform relaxed modpack focused around Cobblemon and Create, with no excess tech or magic mods tossed in other than those for convenience or important Quality of Life features.

No quest book or directly dictated guidance, just go and explore, or kick back, relax, cook and decorate. This pack is designed, balanced, and configured with co-operative server play in mind, it's not a race or a competition all the time, it's a journey together.

Large focus on decorative blocks & items, as well as a large amount of different varied foods and crops available, pretty much just for fun. 

Created primarily for my small private server and friend group (The Pizza Party & Pals), this pack overhauls Minecraft to be _almost_ entirely about Cobblemon. Hostile mobs have been manually disabled, recipes and item sources have been adjusted to compensate for this to try and ensure that everything is still attainable, and are still being actively tweaked and adjusted. With that in mind, if you experience any issues, please do not bother the mod developers, as some of the custom changes and overlaps may be the cause and not directly their mod(s).

This modpack uses NeoForge, but is also running Sinytra Connector to run some Fabric mods.

Edit configs at your own risk! The configs have been tailored specifically to my group's expectations, suggestions, and tastes, and some performance or tweak mods have specifically been configured to make compatible to avoid rendering errors and crashes. Editing them from the provided values other than /some/ graphics settings is not advisable unless you really know what you're doing, and I will not be able to provide support for issues that may arise. Your mileage may of course vary.

Coming Soon TM:
- Fleshed out mini-wiki on the Github with useful pack-specific info such as:
  - All important keybinds + changed default bindings
  - Useful mods/features that are easy to miss
  - All custom content
- In-game custom Patchouli book for the pack covering useful mods and keybinds and with fun L O R E 


Credit to Alaris from the Cobblemon community Discord server for allowing the inclusion of their updated Cobblefolk Resource pack!
